title: Senior Teacher - Adda247 Global Group - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Adda247 Global Group - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adda247 Global Group:
Adda247 Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247 Global Group!
